label: Transparent Red Cabbage motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Red Cabbage transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single whole red cabbage head, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: compact red cabbage head with layered planning-system geometry: overlapping curled leaves forming a dense spiral core, waxy purple outer leaves, blue-violet veins, crimson-maroon leaf shadows, pale lavender cut highlights, subtle vegetable-bed earth marks only as tiny natural speckles on the lower leaves, no stem stump prominence.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural wax bloom and fine vein texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; no cropping; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light, structured and analytical, preserves waxy purple leaf color and blue vein detail, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: use only red cabbage colors: purple, burgundy, crimson, blue-violet wax, pale lavender vein highlights, dark plum shadows, muted vegetable-bed earth speckles; do not use #00ff00 or bright green anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no knife, no plate, no garden bed, no second vegetable, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible transparent red cabbage motif is the source reference for colors, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Red Cabbage".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: layered planning system for roadmaps, dependencies, sprint layers, capacity planning, milestone health, and structured operational review; calm, analytical, botanical, layered, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the red cabbage motif: waxy purple leaves, burgundy folded shadows, blue-violet veins, pale lavender bloom, vegetable-bed umber speckles, soft cabbage-heart ivory, dark plum ink, muted soil borders. Use these motif colors only; do not introduce generic SaaS blue, unrelated green, orange, or rainbow accents.
Layout: polished product design board with a pale cabbage-heart background, left palette and token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small red cabbage motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English product UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "赤キャベツ", "計画レイヤー", "進捗", "依存関係", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, roadmap layer cards, dependency table, capacity chart, burndown line, kanban status chips, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle wax-bloom grain, curled leaf-edge dividers, blue vein hairline rules, nested cabbage-layer spacing rhythm, muted vegetable-bed speckles for separators, soft 8px card rhythm.
Tokens: show shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable samples for background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, radius 0.5rem.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no purple/blue generic gradient wallpaper, no watermark, no random brand names.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible red cabbage motif and the visible Morphous Red Cabbage light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Red Cabbage" with the same layered planning-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: layered planning system for roadmaps, dependencies, sprint layers, capacity planning, milestone health, and structured operational review; night-mode planning console, calm, analytical, botanical, layered, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the red cabbage motif and the light board roles: deep plum ink backgrounds, dark burgundy folded panels, waxy purple surfaces, blue-violet vein focus rings, pale lavender text highlights, cabbage-heart ivory labels, muted soil-umber borders and destructive states. Avoid generic SaaS blue, unrelated green, orange, neon, or rainbow colors.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette and token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small red cabbage motif cutout preview.
Typography: compact English product UI type plus Japanese typography guidance with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "赤キャベツ", "計画レイヤー", "進捗", "依存関係", "検索".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, roadmap layer cards, dependency table, capacity chart, burndown line, kanban status chips, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark wax-bloom grain, curled leaf-edge dividers, blue vein hairline rules, nested cabbage-layer spacing rhythm, muted vegetable-bed speckles for separators, soft 8px card rhythm.
Tokens: show shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable samples for background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart-1 to chart-5, sidebar tokens, radius 0.5rem.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no pure black flat background, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no blue/purple generic gradient wallpaper, no watermark, no random brand names.
